reference: Hello Doctor, my baby is having a fever ranging from one hundred to one hundred and four degrees Fahrenheit, which subsides after taking mefenamic acid at a dosage of sixty milligrams per eleven kilograms of body weight. There are no other obvious symptoms except for the fever. What should I do? Please suggest a course of treatment.
text: Hello doctor, my baby is having a fever ranging from 100 to 104 degrees Fahrenheit, which subsides after taking mefenamic acid at a dosage of 60 mg per 11 kg of body weight. There are no other obvious symptoms except for the fever. What should I do? Please suggest a course of treatment.
